reviews.comment:
Ojo con el mostrador de la estación de servicio, entre los empleados se complotaron y no me quisieron devolver dinero que pagué de más. Son unos chorros

(Translated by Google)
Beware of the gas station counter; the employees conspired against me and refused to refund the money I overpaid. They're crooks.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURhenNEUVJREAE

reviews.comment:
Buen precio siempre, pero los empleados en horario nocturno trabajan sin ganas casi siempre y de día hay que tener cuidado cuando te cobran demás, si no prestas atención te engañan

(Translated by Google)
The price is always good, but the night shift employees are almost always unmotivated, and during the day you have to be careful because they overcharge you; if you're not careful, they'll rip you off.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURhaHU2RnlBRRAB
